zh.Great Wenham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可格亞特 文哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Harre於1586年出生在英國素福爾可哈德利時，她的父親David Scott Harre36歲，母親Ella Strickland26歲。她於1612年6月10日與Stephen Fosdick在英國素福爾可哈德利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1627年之後在英國素福爾可格亞特 文哈姆。

zh-hans.Great Wenham, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可格亞特 文哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Harre于1586年出生在英国素福爾可哈德利时，她的父亲David Scott Harre36岁，母亲Ella Strickland26岁。她于1612年6月10日与Stephen Fosdick在英国素福爾可哈德利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1627年之后在英国素福爾可格亞特 文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Harre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Herre, a pet form of Herebert (see Herbert ).
English: nickname from Middle English herre ‘chief, lord’ (Old English hēarra).

variants.name: Harr
meanings: North German: from a short form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names with the first element hari, heri ‘army’, for example, Hermann , Herbert .
Norwegian (Hårr): habitational name from the farm name Hårr or Haarr south of Stavanger, of uncertain origin. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the variant Haarr.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Harre was born in 1586, in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England, her father, David Scott Harre, was 36 and her mother, Ella Strickland, was 26. She married Stephen Fosdick on 10 June 1612, in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1627, in Great Wenham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Harre est née en 1586, à Hadleigh, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, David Scott Harre, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ella Strickland, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Stephen Fosdick le 10 juin 1612, à Hadleigh, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1627, à Great Wenham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Harre 1586 in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Scott Harre 36 und ihre Mutter Ella Strickland 26. Sie hat am 10. Juni 1612 in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England Stephen Fosdick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1627 in Great Wenham, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Harre è nata il nel 1586 nel Hadleigh, Suffolk, England, sua padre, David Scott Harre, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Ella Strickland, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Stephen Fosdick il 10 giugno 1612, nel Hadleigh, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1627, nel Great Wenham, Suffolk, England.

ja.Suffolk, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.Hadleigh, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクハドレイグ
ja.Great Wenham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクグレアト ウエンハム
ja.lifeSummary: Anna Harreが1586年にイギリススフォルクハドレイグで生まれた時，父David Scott Harreは36歳，母Ella Stricklandは26歳であった。1612年6月10日にイギリススフォルクハドレイグでStephen Fosdickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1627年以後にイギリススフォルクグレアト ウエンハムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Harre(이)가 1586년 영국 수폴크 하들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Scott Harre(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ella Strickland(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1612년 6월 10일 영국 수폴크 하들리에서 Stephen Fosdick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1627년 이후 영국 수폴크 그리트 웬함에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Harre nasceu em 1586, em Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, David Scott Harre, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ella Strickland, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephen Fosdick em 10 de junho de 1612, em Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1627, em Great Wenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Harre родилась в 1586 г. в местности хадлиг, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени David Scott Harre было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ella Strickland, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen Fosdick 10 июня 1612 г. в местности хадлиг, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1627 г. в местности грит венам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Harre nació en 1586, en Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, David Scott Harre, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ella Strickland, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Stephen Fosdick el 10 de junio de 1612, en Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1627, en Great Wenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
